overview.description: The Hartford Schroders Tax-Aware Bond ETF (HTAB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund of US investment-grade debt selected for tax-efficient cash flow. Investments include both taxable and tax-free debt, and the fund uses derivatives to supplement its tax-efficient strategy. HTAB was launched on Apr 18, 2018 and is issued by The Hartford.
